sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) spoil, and gener. prey, booty, Gen 49:27 Exo 15:9 and frequently; used also of cattle taken as booty, 1Sa 15:19 שְׁלַל דָּוִד David’s spoil, i.e. taken by David, 1Sa 30:20 חִלֵּק שָׁלָל to divide prey, Gen 49:27 Psa 68:13 Jer 21:9 הָֽיְתָה לֹו נַפְשֹׁו לְשָׁלָל “his life shall be to him for booty,” i.e. he shall be preserved alive, Jer 38:2 39:18 . Once for אִישׁ שָׁלָל a spoiler, warrior, Jud. 5:30 .

(2) gain (Ausbeute) Pro 31:11.
